chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 445 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2078/2025 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 06.05.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the alleged detenue, namely Ghulam Qadir alias Jaro has been nominated in FIR bearing Crime No.39 of 2025 registered at Police Station, Daharki, District Ghotki for offence under Sections 324, 353, 399 and 402 PPC, as such the instant Constitutional Petition has become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is dismissed having become infructuous along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
